---
title: "INFO 521 — Lecture Slides"
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: false
---

Lecture decks for **Machine Learning Foundations** (INFO 521). Each deck is a
self-contained reveal.js presentation (dark/light toggle, speaker notes, PDF export).

| Module | Deck | Link |
|--------|------|------|
| **[M1 — Foundations & Linear Regression](modules/m1-linear-least-squares/index.html)** | Lecture A — Setup & Model | [m1a-setup-and-model](modules/m1-linear-least-squares/m1a-setup-and-model.html) |
| | Lecture B — Normal Equations | [m1b-normal-equations](modules/m1-linear-least-squares/m1b-normal-equations.html) |
| | Appendix: Matrix Calculus | [appendix](modules/m1-linear-least-squares/appendix-matrix-calculus.html) |
| **[M2 — Generalization](modules/m2-generalization/index.html)** | Lecture A — Evaluation & Cross-Validation | [m2a-evaluation-cv](modules/m2-generalization/m2a-evaluation-cv.html) |
| | Lecture B — Bias–Variance & Ridge | [m2b-bias-variance-ridge](modules/m2-generalization/m2b-bias-variance-ridge.html) |
| **[M3 — MLE & Uncertainty](modules/m3-mle-uncertainty/index.html)** | Lecture A — Likelihood & MLE | [m3a-likelihood-mle](modules/m3-mle-uncertainty/m3a-likelihood-mle.html) |
| | Lecture B — Properties of MLE | [m3b-mle-uncertainty](modules/m3-mle-uncertainty/m3b-mle-uncertainty.html) |
| | Appendix: Covariance | [appendix](modules/m3-mle-uncertainty/appendix-covariance.html) |
| **[M4 — Bayesian Inference](modules/m4-bayesian-inference/index.html)** | Lecture A — Priors & Beta-Binomial | [m4a-bayes-beta-binomial](modules/m4-bayesian-inference/m4a-bayes-beta-binomial.html) |
| | Lecture B — Conjugate Gaussian Posterior | [m4b-gaussian-posterior](modules/m4-bayesian-inference/m4b-gaussian-posterior.html) |
| **[M5 — Approximate Inference & Bayesian Classification](modules/m5-approximate-inference/index.html)** | Lecture A — Logistic Regression & Newton | [m5a-logistic-newton](modules/m5-approximate-inference/m5a-logistic-newton.html) |
| | Lecture B — Laplace & Sampling | [m5b-laplace-sampling](modules/m5-approximate-inference/m5b-laplace-sampling.html) |
| **[M6 — SVM & Clustering](modules/m6-svm-clustering/index.html)** | Lecture A — Maximum-Margin Classification | [m6a-svm](modules/m6-svm-clustering/m6a-svm.html) |
| | Lecture B — k-means & the Unsupervised Turn | [m6b-kmeans-clustering](modules/m6-svm-clustering/m6b-kmeans-clustering.html) |
| **[M7 — PCA](modules/m7-pca/index.html)** | Lecture — PCA & Course Synthesis | [m7a-pca](modules/m7-pca/m7a-pca.html) |

*(Each module name links to its landing page; `index.qmd` files are thin module
landings, never lecture decks.)*

---

[← Course Hub](https://gchism94.github.io/info521){target="_blank"}
